name: system-access-indicators
description: Plain-string substrings requesting elevated system access, shell execution, or disabling host-side security controls. Routed through Avoidance because the violation is a potential harm to the operator's infrastructure, not a professional-scope issue. Caller lowercases input before matching. Currently consumed by the TS core; the Python SDK already covers these via regex in AvoidanceGate.HARM_PATTERNS['system'] and can opt in later if the string-list surface is useful.
